meaning: 摩苏尔[伊拉克北部城市]
examples: In the scarred northern city of Mosul much of the battle damage is recent.
"Currently, there are some 35,000 army and police in Mosul city alone," Redmond said.
Political control of the area around Mosul, and the oil beneath it, is in dispute.
On Friday, Iraqi security forces arrested four men in Mosul in connection with anti-Christian attacks.
